source: O*NET 28.0 (sample subset for UNMAPPED hackathon demo)

tasks.title: Electrical and Electronics Repairers
tasks.task: Diagnose malfunctions in electrical equipment using testing instruments.

tasks.title: Electrical and Electronics Repairers
tasks.task: Replace defective components such as capacitors, resistors, and circuit boards.

tasks.title: Telecommunications Equipment Installers
tasks.task: Test circuits and components of malfunctioning equipment to isolate sources of problems.

tasks.title: Retail Salespersons
tasks.task: Greet customers and determine what each customer wants or needs.

tasks.title: Customer Service Representatives
tasks.task: Resolve customers' service or billing complaints by exchanging merchandise or adjusting bills.

tasks.title: General and Operations Managers
tasks.task: Direct and coordinate activities of businesses or departments concerned with pricing and sales.

tasks.title: Bookkeeping, Accounting Clerks
tasks.task: Operate computers programmed with accounting software to record, store, and analyze information.

tasks.title: First-Line Supervisors of Farming Workers
tasks.task: Observe and evaluate the work of farming equipment operators and farm workers.

tasks.title: Graders and Sorters of Agricultural Products
tasks.task: Examine produce to determine whether size, color, and condition meet established standards.

tasks.title: Construction Laborers
tasks.task: Load, unload, and identify building materials, merchandise, and equipment to be moved.

tasks.title: Electricians
tasks.task: Connect wires to circuit breakers, transformers, or other components.

tasks.title: Education Workers
tasks.task: Provide students with opportunities to observe, question, and investigate.

tasks.title: Nursing Assistants
tasks.task: Answer patient call signals and determine how to assist them.
